RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/pgsql/crsp_read_dbtablename_cc_all.pgsql
RuleSet.GenRule: return query select distinct( $lower poptop Table reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ as $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implPgSqlClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ order by ClassCode asc;
